title: Consultation: Guidance on asbestos in drinking water - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation: Guidance on asbestos in drinking water

## Current status: Open
Opened on January 23, 2026 and will close to new input on March 24, 2026.
Health Canada has drafted Guidance on asbestos in drinking water . We're looking for feedback, in particular on the approach used to develop the guidelines and on the potential costs of implementing them.

## Join in: How to participate
Send an email to water-consultations-eau@hc-sc.gc.ca with your ideas or comments to make yourself heard.
Send a letter with your ideas and input to the address in contact information below.

## Who is the focus of this consultation
We will engage with:
- federal, provincial and territorial regulatory and health protection agencies
- industry stakeholders
- academic communities
- non-governmental organizations

## Key questions for discussion
Your ideas and inputs are sought on the:
- health risk assessment
We will use the information we gather from this consultation to revise the guidelines as needed.
Water and Air Quality Bureau Health Canada 219 Laurier Ave West Ottawa ON K1A 0K9 Email: water-consultations-eau@hc-sc.gc.ca
